title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rapido - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Rapido invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rapido:
Rapido is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rapido!
